name: Italian Meatballs-Pasta Machine
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 Pounds Lean ground beef or turkey
recipeInstructions:
1. Use the meatball/bagel die.
2. Combine ground beef, salt, pepper, celery, onion, green pepper, and about one cup of bread crumbs in the mixing bin. Mix lightly.
3. Add eggs to the mixture and extrude through the pasta machine.
4. Gradually add additional bread crumbs by the tablespoonful through the top grates as needed to keep the mixture extruding and prevent it from bunching up around the blades.
5. Extrude meatballs in 1 1/2-inch pieces, then roll each into a ball.
6. Heat a pan with 2 tablespoons olive oil and sauté the meatballs until browned, or place on a broiler rack and bake at 350°F for about 30 minutes, or until browned and firm. The oven method is most efficient when preparing a large quantity for freezing.
7. If to be frozen, cool completely and freeze in zip-loc bags or rigid containers in meal-sized batches.
8. To serve with pasta, add the meatballs to Spaghetti Sauce (bottled or homemade) and simmer for 30 minutes.
